title: WesterosBlocks
description: Custom building blocks for the WesterosCraft server and other medieval themed worlds.
body: --- Originally developed for the mega project WesterosCraft, WesterosBlocks provides the resources to create a more realistic medieval fantasy world. WesterosBlocks includes several hundred custom textures and dozens of new blocks including: **House Banners** A small selection of the hundreds of house banners available in the mod ![A small selection of banners available in the mod](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3668ecc2f5dea2379c65d4078afbec148d31b651_0.webp) **Building blocks** - Consists of several sets of palettes to match different styles and regions of a fantasy world, like frozen climates, desert climates and more. **Terrain blocks** - A vast array of varied blocks to create any terrain you can imagine, with realistic gradients and lifelike textures. **Foliage** - New flowers, crops, weeds and various other plants to enhance your build. **Decorative blocks** - 3D tools, baskets of fruit, gears, ropes, wheels and more And much more! Texture credits: CashBanks, Emoticone11, ThamusKnoward, Doku, Tobi, geeberry
